schema_def.description:
- CONVERTIBLE_DAY_COUNT_BASIS_COUNT_30_360: 30/360 day count convention.
 - CONVERTIBLE_DAY_COUNT_BASIS_COUNT_ACTUAL_360: Actual/360 day count convention.
 - CONVERTIBLE_DAY_COUNT_BASIS_COUNT_ACTUAL_365: Actual/365 day count convention.
schema_def.title:
The standardized way of counting the number of days between two dates.
See more at https://support.carta.com/s/article/day-count-basis
